description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rust:latest Docker image and defines two stages: pre and test. Add a formatting job in the pre stage that runs rustup component add rustfmt-preview, then rustc --version && cargo --version and bash ./bin/check-formatting. Add a pages job in the pre stage that runs apt-get update -yqq and apt-get install -yqq --no-install-recommends libzmq3-dev, caches the target/doc directory, executes cargo doc --no-deps, moves the generated docs to a public folder, writes a meta refresh index file with '<meta http-equiv=\"refresh\" content=0;url=jupyter_client/index.html>', publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact, and only runs on the dev branch. Add a test:nightly job in the test stage that runs apt-get update -yqq, apt-get install -yqq --no-install-recommends libzmq3-dev, rustup install nightly, caches target/debug, then runs rustc --version && cargo --version and RUST_VERSION=nightly bash ./bin/test. Add a test:stable job in the test stage that runs apt-get update -yqq, apt-get install -yqq --no-install-recommends libzmq3-dev, caches target/debug, then runs rustc --version && cargo --version and bash ./bin/test.
